summary:
Chickenpox infections are especially perilous for fetal health from week 24 up until delivery; however, peak danger lies primarily within weeks 26–35 as major organ formation concludes by then but before full term defenses have matured sufficiently post-week 35.
Thus,
The correct choice reflecting maximum threat duration remains \boxed{C}.
```

agent2 (Round 1 summarized): Chickenpox infections are especially perilous for fetal health from week 24 up until delivery; however, peak danger lies primarily within weeks 26–35 as major organ formation concludes by then but before full term defenses have matured sufficiently post-week 35.
Thus,
The correct choice reflecting maximum threat duration remains \boxed{C}.
```. Answer choice: C
